mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transit_cache (from_attraction_id, to_attraction_id, departure_hour, duration_minutes, transport_mode, transfer_count, fare, total_distance_m) VALUES (#{fromAttractionId}, #{toAttractionId}, #{departureHour}, #{durationMinutes}, #{transportMode}, #{transferCount}, #{fare}, #{totalDistanceM}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE duration_minutes = VALUES(duration_minutes), transport_mode = VALUES(transport_mode), transfer_count = VALUES(transfer_count), fare = VALUES(fare), total_distance_m = VALUES(total_distance_m), cached_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
